full_text:
Liu Ba (Zichu) 劉巴 (子初)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ba (劉巴), styledZichu (子初), was born in Lingling. Rescued Shu’s economy after Liu Bei’s troops had plundered the treasury. Liu Ba was affiliated with Yuan Shu, the Wei Kingdom, Liu Zhang, and the Shu Kingdom. Liu Ba lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
